_meta.description: Bản đồ trí tuệ mã nguồn — tự động tích lũy khi AI đọc/sửa code. Giúp AI sau chỉ cần đọc file này là hiểu ngay cấu trúc, liên kết, và cách sửa.
changelog: v72: Firebase cost/performance closeout. The current 62 changed API routes use src/lib/api/handler.ts for request IDs, Server-Timing metadata, normalized parse/auth errors, structured server logs, and generic unexpected 500 responses. Added /api/pos/payment-config, which requires manage_orders and returns only payment QR data. Admin settings, inventory, POS, and suppliers defer non-critical code/data. This is CLOSED -> MONITORING: preserve POS/inventory transaction invariants and only reopen with real timing or Firebase cost evidence.

v71: Removed all default-config seed endpoints (/api/seed-admin, /api/seed-config, /api/admin/seed-taxonomy) and every config-wide default-reset caller. ConfigContext now reads missing documents without writing defaults and refuses every client write until all config reads finish; member tiers also wait for a valid snapshot. Taxonomy client writes are denied by Firestore Rules; /api/admin/taxonomy is admin-only, reads the existing tree in a transaction, refuses missing config and slug renames, and preserves descendants/concurrent edits.

v70: Final POS hot-path handoff: a measured DEBT checkout with a legacy SKU logged total 3639ms (down from 7646ms), transaction callback 2193ms (down from 4608ms), and zero FIFO reads. The remaining 1397ms reserveIdsWait is intentional readable-ID collision protection, not a cache candidate. Firebase qlch-vanlanh now has all 20 products classified (18 migrated legacy); implementation is commit 5509e6ac and draft PR #20.

v69: POS no longer reloads cashier-shift after a checkout that did not change the shift (including DEBT); cash/bank refreshes remain. GET /api/pos/cashier-shift returns active shift by default and loads the 10 closed-shift history documents only for the Cashier tab, reducing both post-checkout and initial POS read cost.

v68: POS checkout starts readable-ID reservation while FIFO lots are loading, then reports reserveIdsWait (critical path) separately from reserveIdsTotal (overlapped duration). Auth telemetry splits Firebase token verification and users/{uid} profile read; the checkout no longer re-reads that user document in its Firestore transaction. scripts/backfill-product-inventory-tracking.mjs safely classifies previously unmarked products with a read-only default and per-product transaction guard.

v67: Products now persist inventoryTrackingMode. New imports set fifo; an older product is classified from its first completed checkout, and known legacy products skip empty inventory_lots queries while still emitting LEGACY_STOCK audit entries.

v66: POS checkout telemetry now separates workflow, repair-product, FIFO preparation and FIFO read timing. Each FIFO query reports product id, duration and returned lot count before any query limit is considered, preserving FIFO correctness while identifying costly lot histories.

v65: POS checkout includes operation_requests idempotency in its first core getAll batch. A completed replay intentionally reads that same batch before returning its cached result, eliminating one normal-checkout Firestore round trip.

v64: POS checkout hot path now emits per-transaction-attempt timings, batches core reads/FIFO/ID reservations, reuses commission product snapshots, merges revenue deltas, and moves newly opened cashier shifts to deterministic payment movements plus 16 tally shards. Legacy open shifts retain direct totals until close.

v63: Reconciled file line counts after major refactoring. types.ts is now a barrel re-export (10 lines) split into src/lib/types/ (10 files: common, catalog, commerce, content, repair, inventory, finance, voucher, workflow, contact). parts/page.tsx refactored from ~2005 to ~354 lines with logic extracted to src/features/parts/ (ImportReceiptModals, importReceiptTypes, importReceiptUtils). repairs/page.tsx refactored from ~2852 to ~1435 with 12 sub-components extracted to src/features/repairs/. pos/page.tsx corrected to ~2220 with PosCartPanel and posTypes extracted to src/features/pos/. New src/features/ directory houses modular feature components for parts, pos, repairs, technician, articles, and excel-import.

v62: Closed the system and POS audit trackers after all concrete open BUG entries in the 2026-07-03 pass were fixed. Remaining roadmap items are features or performance follow-ups requiring production timing samples, not open bug regressions; manifest openBugs is now 0.

v61: Repair editor save is now atomic. /api/repairs/edit performs profile, device, checklist, media, staff, timing, and payment updates in one Admin SDK transaction with manage_repairs auth, idempotency, ticketVersion, terminal-state, and paid/refunded guards. Admin repairs edit submit no longer calls payment-edit followed by a client transaction.

v60: Initial-data bootstrap no longer exposes order/repair legacy import modes that would be blocked by production Firestore Rules. Supported client bootstrap modes remain visible; future historical order/repair import should be built as dedicated server APIs if needed.

v59: Closed remaining admin catalog full-read bugs with bounded initial reads. Products, parts, services, ProductSeriesManager, and inventory product preload now cap initial Firestore reads at 300 docs instead of streaming/loading whole collections; deeper full-history search/load-more remains a UX improvement rather than an unbounded read bug.

v58: Closed repair checklist/media direct-write bug and import receipt autosave lost-update bug. /api/repairs/checklist now patches checklist with auth, assignment, terminal status, field whitelist, and ticketVersion guards; technician UI uses it. /api/inventory/import now supports patch_item for per-line autosave with receiptVersion guard, recalculated totals, and server-side version increment; admin inventory no longer writes import_receipts.items directly for autosave.

v57: Repair post-handover media append moved off direct client Firestore writes. RepairTicketBoard now calls /api/repairs/media, which requires manage_repairs auth, validates media URLs/YouTube links, guards editable statuses, and appends postRepairMedia via Admin SDK arrayUnion. Checklist direct writes remain open under BUG-REPAIR-021.

v56: Public /api/search no longer reads full product/service collections on cache miss. Product and service lookup now use bounded searchKeywords array-contains queries, services keep a small bounded fallback for legacy docs, and /admin/services writes searchKeywords for new or edited services.

v55: Closed voucher uniqueness and public tracking scale/security bugs. Admin voucher mutations now go through /api/admin/vouchers with normalized deterministic code docs and client voucher writes closed in Firestore Rules; validate/web checkout/POS checkout/order rollback reject duplicate active voucher codes. /api/tracking now rate-limits, normalizes phone, bounds history queries, and returns masked whitelisted payloads. The admin/vouchers 500-customer read spike is marked fixed with exact tier-count aggregates deferred as a Firebase read optimization follow-up.

v54: Closed catalog DTO, revenue fallback, mutation idempotency, completed-order refund, and repair handover payload bugs. Public product/service paths now share publicCatalog DTOs; revenue no longer falls back to raw scans on aggregate failure; inventory/order/repair mutation cache hits verify operation contracts; completed order cancellation persists refund state; repair handover accepts operationKey and additionalFees.

v53: Closed five more audit bugs: import receipt supplier fallback now accepts receipt.supplierId, inventory import paymentMethod is cash|bank|debt only, public /api/checkout requires idempotencyKey, POS repair lookup is bounded by createdAt desc limit(20), and POS checkout reads the active cashier shift lock doc instead of querying open shifts.

v52: Inventory import payment contract now uses only cash|bank|debt end-to-end: preview UI no longer sends paid, /api/inventory/import rejects unknown paymentMethod values, ImportReceipt types were narrowed, and order/complete guards accept receipt.supplierId as the supplier fallback for import lines.

v51: Commission calculation no longer swallows transaction-critical errors; calculateAndSaveCommissionsServer logs and rethrows so POS checkout, order transition, and repair handover cannot silently skip commission docs or commissionCost aggregates.

v50: Manual commission creation moved from client Firestore addDoc to /api/admin/commissions/manual with admin auth, required idempotencyKey, staff/admin recipient validation, operation_requests caching, revenue aggregate commissionCost increment in the same transaction, and commissions writes are now server-only in Firestore Rules.

v49: Manual expense creation is now admin-only: Firestore expenses writes are no longer granted by view_revenue, /api/revenue/expenses requires admin auth, and /admin/revenue hides the create-expense action for staff viewers.

v48: Supplier debt payment now goes through /api/admin/suppliers/pay-debt with manage_inventory auth, required idempotencyKey, current-debt validation, one Firestore transaction for supplier transaction/expense/debt updates, and revenue aggregate increments for supplierPaymentCost plus cash/bank expense channels.

v47: Admin collect-debt now merges customerId debt orders with legacy phone debt orders, dedupes by order id, and rejects payments that cannot be fully distributed before writing debt/revenue updates.

v46: Admin collect-debt now requires an idempotencyKey, records completed operation_requests, validates cache hits by type/customer/amount/payment method/actor, and the customer drawer sends crypto.randomUUID per submit.
v45: /api/services/homepage-pricing now returns a whitelisted homepage pricing service DTO instead of raw service documents.

v44: System bug task now separates deferred follow-up work from small bug fixes: tracking proof model, voucher tier count aggregates, search indexing, shared public catalog DTOs, fix-held cursor mode, POS checkout timing pass, and revenue diagnostic fallback.

v43: Public /api/appointments and /api/checkout now strip HTML from submitted customer names and only update existing CRM names when the current name is empty or generic, matching /api/customers/sync.
v42: /api/ai now requires Firebase bearer auth, path-safe roomId, and decoded uid == roomId before pushing bot replies to RTDB; ChatWidget auto-reply sends the current Firebase ID token.
v41: /api/admin/fix-held is now dry-run by default; apply requires apply=true and confirm=FIX_HELD_APPLY, updates only products with changed held counts, and records a maintenance audit log.

v40: Public /api/search is now catalog-only with whitelisted product/service DTO fields and no order/repair reads; admin order/repair lookup moved to /api/admin/search with Firebase admin/staff bearer auth and masked summaries.
v39: Public /api/proxy-image now rejects arbitrary URLs; it only proxies https VietQR image hosts, uses a 5s timeout, requires image content-type, and caps responses at 2MB.
v38: Bounty OTP request record action now requires a Firebase ID token whose phone_number matches the requested phone; MissionsWidget records only after OTP confirmation succeeds.
v37: Public /api/products now clamps caller-provided limit to 1..50, always filters active products, and returns a whitelisted public product DTO instead of raw Firestore product documents.

v36: Audit pass recorded admin/vouchers read spike: opening the vouchers page can trigger DiscountRulesTab tier preview to query customers ordered by totalSpent limit(500), causing 500 Firestore reads before the customer preview is needed.

v35: Audit pass found initial-data order/repair Excel import still writes orders and repairs through client Firestore transactions, but Firestore Rules now block client creates for both server-only collections.

v34: Audit pass found idempotency guards are inconsistent across mutation APIs: POS checkout, inventory import, order transition, repair handover, and repair payment-edit accept completed operation keys too broadly compared with newer repair APIs that verify type/reference/actor.

v33: Audit pass found voucher code uniqueness is documented but not enforced: admin vouchers create auto-ID docs with no duplicate check while validate/web checkout/POS checkout query active vouchers by code limit(1).

v32: Audit pass added supplier payment aggregate drift and remaining admin catalog full-read paths: services page full services listener, ProductSeriesManager full products stream, and inventory refreshProducts full products load.

v31: Audit pass found repair editor edit-save is not atomic: admin repairs page commits payment via /api/repairs/payment-edit before a separate client transaction updates the remaining repair profile/device/media/staff fields.

v30: Audit pass added raw public catalog DTO leak (products/services expose costPrice/supplier/held through API/SSR/client props), inventory import paymentMethod mismatch (UI sends paid while API/report expects cash|bank|debt), and receipt-level supplier fallback mismatch during complete_import.

v29: System bug/performance audit opened follow-up plan for POS checkout latency, full products listeners, search/revenue scans, supplier payment atomicity, public tracking proof/rate-limit, repair client patch bypass, import receipt lost-update risk, bounty OTP record proof, products API limit clamp, proxy-image SSRF guard, AI RTDB room ownership, appointment/customer-name overwrite sync, web checkout required idempotency, fix-held maintenance guard, manual commission aggregate consistency, collect-debt idempotency and legacy-phone distribution, completed-order refund state drift, public search order/repair leak, and repair handover payload/idempotency mismatch.

v28: Admin revenue actual-collected fix - source revenue fields now represent collected revenue instead of gross order total, debt collection increments payment-channel revenue, and /admin/revenue separates channel/source breakdowns.
v27: POS cashier shift history - /api/pos/cashier-shift returns recent closed shifts and the Thu ngan tab shows closed-shift history for cash/bank reconciliation after closing a shift.

v26: POS debt collection sync - /api/pos/checkout unifies selected old-order payments and surplus debt offset through orderPaymentTotals, updates old order paymentHistory/customer_transactions/revenue/cashier shift, and POS payment UI shows remaining amount/change due.

v25: POS cashier shifts - cashier_shifts stores locked opening cash/bank amounts, POS cash/bank payments increment active shift totals in checkout transaction, and cashier tab opens/closes the active shift through /api/pos/cashier-shift.

v24: Retail ops commission/revenue/POS plan - commission_rules support calculationMode and priceRanges; revenue aggregates split cash/bank/other/debt channels; inventory imports paid by debt increment importDebt/debtExpenses without increasing importCost until actual payment.
v1: Initial creation — mapped collections, key files, cross-links
v2: Phase 4/6/8 completed — supplier dropdown+debt, variant+review UI, POS repair lookup+auto-discount
v3: CurrencyInput refactor completed. Planned: Import v3 (NCC per-item + payment method paid/debt)
v4: Import v3 COMPLETED — NCC per-item (CreateReceiptModal), paymentMethod toggle (ImportPreviewModal), grouped debt (executeFinalImport). Receipt headers derive supplier from items.

v5: Supplier validation guard — handleOrderReceipt blocks transition if any item missing supplier. Draft expanded view adds NCC dropdown per-item with auto-save+create-new. Button disabled+warning when NCC incomplete.
Planned CRM expansion: CRUD, appointments, tags, yearly tier (Bronze→Platinum) config in system_config/customer_tiers, Excel export (SheetJS); current slice implements order/repair drawer only
v7: Live Chat Omnichannel — Facebook/Zalo config, webhook/RTDB runtime lessons, Facebook profile/media rendering, CRM room linkage and Repair/POS prefill
v8: Automated scan added missing collections (orders, users, expenses, commissions, appointments) and injected root-level guardrails.
v9: Deep scan identified activities, media_library, and mapped multiple system_config singletons (tier_settings, main_settings, repairs, receipt).
v10: Added databaseSchema derived from types.ts and mapped core API endpoints from src/app/api.
v11: Exhaustive mapping of all interfaces from types.ts and all API routes from src/app/api
v12: Fixed databaseSchema fields mapping to show actual TypeScript types instead of "any".
v13: Bổ sung chi tiết chức năng thực tế của từng API Endpoint thay vì chỉ ghi Mapped từ mã nguồn.
v14: POS QR Scanner — products now carry sku/barcode/productCode for QR labels; POS can add products by keyboard scanner, camera BarcodeDetector, or manual code entry.

v15: Homepage appearance config — admin controls presentation filters in system_config/layout_settings; pricing reads active Firestore services and reviews read Google Places API without manual fallback.
v16: Google homepage reviews migrated from Places API Legacy to Place Details (New); the server uses a field mask and normalizes the response for the storefront.
v17: Config revalidation sentinel layout now targets /(customer) layout instead of root / layout, preventing admin auth Router Cache purge after appearance saves.
v18: Admin config saves request background /api/revalidate instead of invoking a Server Action from the browser; the route accepts a signed admin session cookie or the internal secret.

v19: QR/Barcode label print fit optimization — ProductQrLabelModal now supports smaller paper presets, custom mm size, two-labels-per-row stock, column gap tuning, configured shop-name branding, compact barcode aliases, text density, content scale, and safe margins without changing product code schema or checkout behavior.

v20: Repair workflow Firestore v2 — repairStatuses is the only repair runtime source, require* features use exit-gate semantics, config validation is shared, and legacy statuses remains preserved but unused.

v21: Roadmap status reconciliation — merged/completed plans were normalized, residual production/device/role checks were separated from code completion, and the obsolete migrate:inventory package command was removed.
v22: Read source code one by one and merged accurate Database Schema & API Endpoints.

v23: Service variants — /service/[id] derives variants from the current service's deepest categoryIds and renders active sibling services via fetchServiceVariants above the booking form; booking date selection uses an inline calendar instead of a 7-day dropdown.

cashier_shifts.description: Ca thu ngan POS. Staff/admin mo ca voi so tien mat/chuyen khoan dau ca da khoa; POS checkout tu dong cong phat sinh tien mat/chuyen khoan vao ca dang mo; chot ca luu expected totals.
changeLog: v64: Newly opened shifts aggregate checkout movements through 16 deterministic tally shards; close snapshots the tallies into cashSalesAmount/bankSalesAmount for history.
v27: GET /api/pos/cashier-shift returns recent closed shifts; POS cashier tab displays closed-shift history for reconciliation.
v26: Checkout increments cash/bank shift totals with the retained amount from current order plus old-debt payment, excluding change due.
v25: Added active cashier shift tracking. Cash/bank/Momo POS payments require an open shift and increment shift totals in checkout transaction.

cashier_shift_movements.description: Immutable POS payment movement per cashier shift. Document ID is deterministic from shiftId and idempotency operation key, so transaction retries cannot double-count a payment.
changeLog: v64: Added as the idempotent payment audit record for new cashier shifts.

cashier_shift_tallies.description: Sixteen deterministic aggregate shards per new cashier shift. Checkout increments exactly one shard; GET and close sum all shards instead of repeatedly updating the active shift document.
changeLog: v64: Added to remove the active cashier shift document as a high-frequency checkout write target.

products.description: Sản phẩm (linh kiện + bán lẻ + proposed). isProposed=true = chưa nhập kho.

import_receipts.description: Phiếu nhập kho. status: draft→ordered→completed. Khi completed, executeFinalImport chạy runTransaction cập nhật stock+costPrice+supplierDebt. supplier/supplierId giờ ở item-level.
changeLog: v30: Public catalog paths currently need a whitelist DTO mapper so costPrice/supplier/held/internal fields are not serialized to customer API/SSR/client payloads.
v2: supplierId field added to link to suppliers collection
v3: supplier+supplierId moved to per-item level. paymentMethod added (paid|debt). Receipt-level supplier optional/backward compat.
v5: handleOrderReceipt validates all items have supplier before status transition. Draft expanded view has editable NCC dropdown per-item.
v30: complete_import guard must be aligned with receipt-level supplierId fallback; paymentMethod must be normalized to cash|bank|debt instead of UI paid.

suppliers.description: Nhà cung cấp. totalDebt = tổng công nợ hiện tại. Dropdown NCC per-item trong CreateReceiptModal và Draft expanded view.
usedIn: parts/page.tsx (per-item dropdown in both CreateReceiptModal + draft edit + auto-create)
changeLog: v2: Live dropdown with create-new in both modals. Realtime listener via onSnapshot.
v3: Dropdown per-item trong CreateReceiptModal. executeFinalImport groups debt by supplierId.
v5: Dropdown per-item added to draft expanded view. Uses draftSupplierSearch+draftSupplierActiveKey state. handleAutoSaveSupplier persists to Firestore.

supplier_transactions.description: Lịch sử giao dịch NCC. type=IMPORT (ghi nợ) | IMPORT_PAID (thanh toán ngay) | PAYMENT (trả nợ).
changeLog: v2: Now auto-created when import receipt is completed with a linked supplierId.
v3: type IMPORT_PAID for thanh toán ngay. Grouped by supplierId (1 phiếu tạo nhiều transactions cho nhiều NCC). COMPLETED.

repairs.description: Phiếu sửa chữa. Phân công KTV và chuyển giao được xử lý qua API server; KTV mới chỉ nhận trách nhiệm sau khi chấp nhận yêu cầu.
changeLog: v2: POS now queries repairs by customerPhone onBlur to auto-link repair tickets.
v3: Assignment/transfer dùng transaction, version, idempotency và audit log; client bị chặn đổi trực tiếp staff assignment.

reviews.description: Đánh giá chung (repair/general). Collection riêng cho product reviews dùng product_reviews.

product_reviews.description: Đánh giá sản phẩm. status: pending → approved/rejected. Hiển thị trên ProductDetailClient.
changeLog: v2: Created. Reviews are submitted via /api/reviews POST, displayed in ProductDetailClient with admin moderation.

accessory_discount_rules.description: Quy tắc giảm giá phụ kiện theo dịch vụ SC. triggerKeywords match repair parts, targetKeywords match cart items.
changeLog: v2: Fully integrated into POS. useEffect auto-calculates discounts when repair is linked.

inventory_lots.description: Trạng thái lô hàng. Dùng cho Batch Tracking & FIFO.

inventory_logs.description: Audit trail tồn kho. Mọi thay đổi stock đều ghi log.

customers.description: CRM khách hàng. Doc tự động tạo/cập nhật qua upsertCustomerRecord (POS, web checkout, repair) hoặc được liên kết từ modal live chat khi có tên và số điện thoại.
customers.tierLogic: Tier tính dynamic THEO NĂM — query orders+repairs trong năm hiện tại, không lưu vào doc. Ngưỡng cấu hình tại system_config/customer_tiers.

private_config.chat_integrations.description: Cấu hình bí mật server-side cho Facebook Messenger và Zalo OA; UI chỉ nhận trạng thái token đã lưu.

rtdb.chats.description: Inbox realtime cho Web, Facebook và Zalo. info giữ nguồn/profile/customer link; messages giữ text và Facebook attachments.
rtdb.chats.rules: Admin/staff chat_support qua admin_roles; guest/user chỉ theo room hợp lệ

orders.description: Đơn hàng bán lẻ từ POS và Web. Liên kết với khách hàng qua customer.phone hoặc customer_info.phone.
changeLog: v26: POS old-debt collection updates existing order deposit_amount/paymentStatus/paymentHistory in checkout transaction. New POS orders exclude order-payment cart lines from items/subtotal/commission base.

appointments.description: Lịch hẹn đặt trước của khách hàng.

users.description: Nhân viên và Admin của hệ thống. Dùng cho RBAC và phân quyền.

expenses.description: Chi phí của cửa hàng (marketing, mặt bằng, điện nước...).

commissions.description: Hoa hồng nhân viên kỹ thuật hoặc sale.

commission_rules.description: Cấu hình tỷ lệ hoa hồng (phần trăm theo sản phẩm hoặc cố định).

system_config.tier_settings.description: Cấu hình ngưỡng phân hạng KH (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum). Admin cấu hình tại discount-rules page. Document ID là tier_settings.

activities.description: Hệ thống thông báo (Notification) nội bộ cho Admin/Staff.

media_library.description: Quản lý thư viện hình ảnh và file đính kèm. Dùng chung trên toàn hệ thống.

system_config.main_settings.description: Cấu hình chung hệ thống (Tên cửa hàng, SĐT, Logo, v.v.).

system_config.layout_settings.description: Cấu hình bố cục và nội dung hiển thị homepage do Admin Appearance quản lý.

system_config.repairs.description: Cấu hình workflow sửa chữa/bảo hành. Runtime dùng repairStatuses và warrantyStatuses; statuses là bản legacy được bảo toàn nhưng không còn được đọc.

system_config.receipt.description: Cấu hình máy in biên lai (kích thước, logo hóa đơn, lời chào).

src/app/admin/parts/page.tsx.purpose: Quản lý linh kiện. Đã tách ImportPreviewModal và CreateReceiptModal ra src/features/parts/ImportReceiptModals.tsx; logic hỗ trợ vào importReceiptUtils.ts và importReceiptTypes.ts.

executeFinalImport(paymentMethod).description: Chốt nhập kho. runTransaction: đọc products → cập nhật stock/costPrice → mark receipt completed → group items by supplierId → per-supplier debt/IMPORT_PAID → sync repair ticket parts+payment.

handleImportReceipt(receipt).description: Mở ImportPreviewModal. Tính forecast giá vốn trung bình. Xác định new vs existing items. item.supplier cho newParts init.

handleAutoSaveItem(receiptId, itemIdx, n.description: Auto-save khi sửa giá/SL trong expanded receipt. Cập nhật items[] + totalAmount.

ImportPreviewModal.props: importPreviewModal, setImportPreviewModal, forecastCostPrices, partTypeOptions, suppliers, onConfirm
ImportPreviewModal.paymentMethod: Toggle paid/debt. onConfirm(paymentMethod). Hiển thị debt summary per-supplier từ items.

CreateReceiptModal.props: isOpen, onClose, parts, retailProducts, onCreated, currentUser, suppliers
CreateReceiptModal.supplierInput: Per-item dropdown in table rows. Create-new NCC inline.
CreateReceiptModal.submitLogic: addDoc import_receipts (no receipt-level supplier). Items carry supplier+supplierId.

src/components/admin/CurrencyInput.tsx.purpose: Drop-in replacement cho <input type='number'> hiển thị tiền VNĐ với dấu chấm ngăn cách hàng nghìn.
src/components/admin/CurrencyInput.tsx.props: value, onChange(numericValue), onBlur?, className, placeholder, required, min, id, disabled
changeLog: v3: Created + deployed across all admin modules. onBlur prop added for auto-save patterns.

src/app/(customer)/product/[id]/ProductD.purpose: Client component hiển thị chi tiết SP + variant selector + review form.
src/app/(customer)/product/[id]/ProductD.props: { data: ProductData; variants?: VariantItem[]; reviews?: ReviewItem[] }
subComponents: ReviewForm — inline form gửi đánh giá qua /api/reviews POST

src/app/(customer)/product/[id]/page.tsx.purpose: Server component fetch product detail + variants + reviews in parallel.
src/app/(customer)/product/[id]/page.tsx.dataFlow: fetchDetailItem → deepest categoryIds → fetchProductVariants(categoryId) + fetchProductReviews(id) → pass to ProductDetailClient

src/app/(customer)/_lib/server-queries.t.purpose: Server-side Firestore queries dùng Admin SDK. Tất cả có cache/revalidate.

functions.fetchDetailItem: Fetch single product/service by ID or slug
functions.fetchProductVariants: Fetch products with same deepest categoryIds (excluding current). Uses cache().
functions.fetchServiceVariants: Fetch active services with same deepest categoryIds (excluding current). Uses cache().
functions.fetchProductReviews: Fetch approved reviews for productId from product_reviews collection. Uses cache().

src/app/admin/pos/page.tsx.purpose: POS bán hàng. Cart panel đã tách ra src/features/pos/PosCartPanel.tsx (~697 dòng) và posTypes.ts (~95 dòng). Page vẫn chứa logic checkout, repair lookup, auto-discount, QR/barcode scanner và cashier shift.

handleCheckout.description: Checkout: group cart → build orderData → runTransaction(stock decrement + audit) → commission.

lookupRepairByPhone(phone).description: Query repairs collection by customerPhone. Auto-fills customerName. Sets linkedRepair state.
reads: repairs (where customerPhone == phone, orderBy createdAt desc)

handleProductScan(rawCode).description: Normalize QR/barcode payload and add matching product by sku, barcode, productCode, or product id. Supports keyboard scanner, camera BarcodeDetector, and manual entry.

autoDiscount.description: useEffect watches [linkedRepair, cart]. Calls fetchActiveDiscountRules() + calculateAccessoryDiscounts(). Shows discount suggestion UI with 'Apply' button.

customerInputs.customerPhone: Has onBlur → lookupRepairByPhone(). Shows repair card + auto-discount below.

currencyInputs: deposit — all use CurrencyInput since v3

src/app/admin/services/page.tsx.purpose: Quản lý dịch vụ sửa chữa. CRUD + modal form. Taxonomy categoryIds also drive storefront service variants.
currencyInputs: price_promo — both use CurrencyInput since v3

src/app/admin/repairs/page.tsx.purpose: Quản lý phiếu sửa chữa. Đã tách 12 sub-components ra src/features/repairs/: RepairTicketBoard, RepairDetailModal, RepairEditorModal, RepairHandoverModal, RepairWarrantyModal, RepairFilters, RepairStatsGrid, RepairPrintTemplates, RepairAuxiliaryModals, RepairPageHeader, RepairMediaManagers, RepairPaginationFooter.
currencyInputs: estimatedPrice (in issue list) — uses CurrencyInput since v3

src/lib/discountRuleUtils.ts.purpose: Tính giảm giá phụ kiện dựa trên repair parts + cart items + rules.

src/lib/types.ts.purpose: Barrel file re-export từ src/lib/types/ gồm 10 module: common.ts, catalog.ts, commerce.ts, content.ts, repair.ts, inventory.ts, finance.ts, voucher.ts, workflow.ts, contact.ts.

relevantTypes.Product: seriesId, color, storageCapacity, conditionLabel đã có
relevantTypes.RepairTicket: customer.phone dùng lookup, payment.status cần auto-update
relevantTypes.Supplier: totalDebt cần increment khi nhập hàng (nếu paymentMethod=debt)
relevantTypes.ImportReceipt: supplier/supplierId giờ optional (backward compat). Per-item supplier trong ImportReceiptItem. paymentMethod: paid|debt

src/app/api/reviews/route.ts.purpose: API submit đánh giá. Có rate limit + geofence. Lưu vào collection 'reviews'. Product reviews gửi qua đây với productId.

crossFileLinks.import_receipt_to_repair: parts/page.tsx executeFinalImport → repairs collection (if repairTicketId exists)
crossFileLinks.pos_to_repairs: pos/page.tsx lookupRepairByPhone() → queries repairs by customerPhone → auto-fill name + show ticket info + calculate discount
crossFileLinks.product_to_variants: page.tsx (server) deepest categoryIds → fetchProductVariants(categoryId) → ProductDetailClient variants prop → render variant cards with links
crossFileLinks.service_to_variants: service/[id]/page.tsx (server) deepest categoryIds → fetchServiceVariants(categoryId) → ServiceDetailClient variants prop → render active service variant cards with links
crossFileLinks.product_to_reviews: page.tsx (server) fetchProductReviews(productId) → ProductDetailClient reviews prop → render + inline submit form
crossFileLinks.import_to_supplier_debt: executeFinalImport → groups items by supplierId → per-supplier: debt (increment totalDebt + IMPORT tx) or paid (IMPORT_PAID tx, no debt). Atomic runTransaction.
crossFileLinks.discount_rules_to_pos: discountRuleUtils.ts calculateAccessoryDiscounts() called in pos/page.tsx useEffect when linkedRepair + cart changes
crossFileLinks.supplier_dropdown: CreateReceiptModal: per-item dropdown in table. ImportPreviewModal: payment method toggle only (no supplier input). Both can create new suppliers inline.
crossFileLinks.currency_input_chain: CurrencyInput.tsx → used by: parts, services, repairs, pos, suppliers, revenue, commissions, UniversalProductModal
crossFileLinks.customer_sync_chain: customerSync.ts upsertCustomerRecord() → called from: pos/page.tsx (transaction), api/checkout/route.ts (inline). Updates totalSpent/totalOrders/totalRepairs/totalAppointments.
crossFileLinks.customer_tier_chain: customerTiers.ts getCustomerTier() → called from: customers/page.tsx. Reads config from system_config/customer_tiers. Queries orders+repairs for yearly spending.
crossFileLinks.customer_drawer_queries: CustomerDetailDrawer → useCustomerActivity → orders (customer_info.phone with customer.phone legacy fallback) and repairs (customer.phone). Queries run only for the open customer and permitted module; appointments remain pending.
crossFileLinks.chat_activity_panel: ChatCustomerActivityPanel → useCustomerActivity for the linked room phone; open orders = Pending/Confirmed/Shipping, open repairs = non-terminal workflow status; listeners require manage_orders/manage_repairs.
crossFileLinks.chat_inbound_chain: Facebook/Zalo webhook → chatServer.upsertExternalInboundMessage() → RTDB chats → admin/chat subscription.
crossFileLinks.facebook_profile_chain: Facebook webhook or authenticated refresh endpoint → Graph API first_name/last_name/profile_pic → RTDB room.info → RoomAvatar/displayName.
crossFileLinks.chat_customer_workflow: ChatCustomerProfileModal → customers/{phone} + RTDB room.info link → one-time sessionStorage handoff → /admin/repairs or /admin/pos → existing transactional workflow; no customer PII in URL.
crossFileLinks.chat_access_guardrail: Web guest → Firebase Anonymous Auth → chats/{uid}; admin role sync → admin_roles/{uid}; API chat requires chat_support; IAM/credential failures must be fixed at runtime identity, never by widening RTDB public read.

phase4_supplier_debt.summary: Supplier dropdown with create-new in both modals. Atomic debt tracking in executeFinalImport.

phase6_variants_reviews.summary: fetchProductVariants + fetchProductReviews queries. ProductDetailClient renders variants + reviews + inline submit form.

service_variants.summary: service detail pages derive variants from deepest taxonomy categoryIds and render active sibling services.

phase8_pos_repair_discount.summary: Phone-based repair lookup in POS. Auto-discount calculation from linked repair parts. Apply button for discount.

currency_input_refactor.summary: CurrencyInput component (formatVND/parseVND/onBlur). Deployed to 9 modules: parts, services, repairs, POS, suppliers, revenue, commissions, UniversalProductModal.

import_v3_per_item_ncc.summary: NCC per-item thay vì per-receipt. paymentMethod (paid/debt) cho toàn phiếu. Grouped debt by supplierId trong executeFinalImport.
decisions: Payment method áp dụng toàn phiếu (không per-item)
Thanh toán ngay vẫn ghi supplier_transaction (IMPORT_PAID) để giữ audit trail

completedChanges.CreateReceiptModal: Removed top-level supplier dropdown. Added per-item supplier dropdown in table rows with create-new NCC inline.
completedChanges.ImportPreviewModal: Removed supplier selection. Added payment method toggle (debt/paid). Shows per-supplier debt summary from items.
completedChanges.executeFinalImport: Signature: (paymentMethod). Groups items by supplierId. debt → IMPORT tx + increment totalDebt. paid → IMPORT_PAID tx (no debt).
completedChanges.receipt_headers: Draft+ordered list headers now derive supplier names from items (IIFE with Set + filter). Shows 'Chưa gán NCC' fallback.
completedChanges.handleImportReceipt: NewPartInfo.supplier uses item.supplier instead of receipt.supplier.
completedChanges.draft_item_rows: Added purple badge showing item.supplier in expanded draft view.

crm_customers_v2.summary: CRM CRUD, appointments, tags, yearly tier, export, aggregate migration, RBAC-gated history and business deep-links are implemented and verified by the completed CRM v2 checklist.
decisions: Tier tính theo tổng chi tiêu NĂM HIỆN TẠI (không all-time totalSpent)
Ngưỡng cấu hình tại Settings/Discount Rules → system_config/customer_tiers
Không cho xóa KH, chỉ thêm + sửa
Drawer lazy-load: chỉ query khi mở, limit 10 per tab

live_chat_omnichannel_v2.summary: Unified Web/Facebook/Zalo inbox plus Facebook profile/media rendering, CRM linkage from avatar and prefilling official Repair/POS flows.
verified: Production webhook event and RTDB write succeeded after runtime RTDB IAM fix
npm.cmd run typecheck passed on current enhancement branch
npm.cmd run build passed on current enhancement branch
pending: Deploy current enhancement branch and test Facebook name/avatar/media with live messages
Validate CRM save and Repair/POS prefill in production
Validate Zalo after OA API/token availability
guardrails: Keep secrets server-side and editable through admin settings
Do not infer Facebook public profile URL from PSID
Do not widen RTDB rules to mask IAM or role-sync failures
Do not create inventory or payment transactions directly in chat
LUÔN dùng runTransaction (Atomic Write) khi đụng đến Tồn kho (stock/held) hoặc Công nợ (supplierDebt) để tránh Race Condition.
KHÔNG BAO GIỜ xóa cứng dữ liệu (Hard Delete) trừ khi thực sự cần thiết. Hãy dùng trạng thái status: 'inactive' (Soft Delete).
KHÔNG ghi đè dữ liệu trực tiếp trong repair ticket. Phải check version (Optimistic Locking) trước khi update.
Bí mật server-side (chat_integrations) không được lộ ra client, đọc qua Server Components hoặc Middleware.
LUÔN dùng component CurrencyInput cho các trường nhập tiền tệ. Các giá trị lưu vào database phải là số nguyên (sử dụng Math.round()).

admin./api/admin/ai: POST: Xử lý request nội bộ từ Admin Panel tới AI Assistant.
admin./api/admin/chat/integrations: GET/POST/PUT: Cấu hình tích hợp Webhook cho Facebook, Zalo OA.
admin./api/admin/chat/quick-replies: GET: Lấy danh sách tin nhắn mẫu (nhanh) cho staff.
admin./api/admin/chat/rooms/[roomId]/customer: GET/POST: Liên kết khách hàng trong hệ thống CRM với 1 phòng chat.
admin./api/admin/chat/rooms/[roomId]/facebook-: POST: Lấy thông tin public profile của khách từ Facebook Graph API.
admin./api/admin/chat/rooms/[roomId]/media/[me: GET: Proxy tải ảnh/video đính kèm từ chat platform để tránh lỗi CORS.
admin./api/admin/chat/send: POST: Nhận tin nhắn từ Admin/Staff và đẩy ra API của Facebook/Zalo.
admin./api/admin/taxonomy: POST: Mutation taxonomy admin-only; transaction trên cây hiện có, không seed hoặc cho phép client ghi đè toàn bộ default.

ai./api/ai: POST: Xử lý request từ client tới AI.

analytics./api/analytics/visit: POST: Ghi nhận lượt truy cập web cho Analytics.

appointments./api/appointments: POST: Đặt lịch hẹn sửa chữa từ Web khách hàng.

auth./api/auth/session: POST/DELETE: Tạo/Hủy HTTP-only Cookie phiên đăng nhập của Admin/Staff bằng Firebase Admin Auth.

checkout./api/checkout: POST: Xử lý giỏ hàng Web. Tạo Order, cập nhật Customer, trừ tồn kho (stock/held).

integrations./api/integrations/facebook/webhook: GET/POST: Nơi nhận Webhook sự kiện nhắn tin từ Facebook Messenger.
integrations./api/integrations/zalo/webhook: GET/POST: Nơi nhận Webhook sự kiện nhắn tin từ Zalo OA.

inventory./api/inventory/import: POST: Xử lý chốt phiếu nhập kho, cộng tồn kho thực tế, tính lại giá vốn bình quân (costPrice).

orders./api/orders/assign-seller: POST: Phân công nhân viên sale chăm sóc đơn hàng.
orders./api/orders/transition: POST: Cập nhật trạng thái đơn hàng (VD: Pending -> Confirmed -> Shipping).

pos./api/pos/payment-config: GET: Requires manage_orders and returns only the QR-payment bank projection needed by POS; no admin TOTP or unrelated bank configuration is exposed.
pos./api/pos/checkout: POST: Bán hàng tại quầy (POS). Tạo Order, trừ kho, ghi nhận doanh thu và dòng tiền (PaymentHistory). Client mới gửi cashierShiftId để route batch-validate trực tiếp ca hiện hành; transaction batch-read operation_requests idempotency cùng core docs, phân loại legacy/FIFO an toàn, và trả FIFO telemetry theo callback/product khi chậm.
pos./api/pos/cashier-shift: GET/POST/PATCH: Lay ca thu ngan dang mo, mo ca voi so dau ca da khoa, va chot ca. POS checkout cong cash/bank vao ca dang mo.

products./api/products: GET: Fetch danh sách sản phẩm nhanh.

repairs./api/repairs/confirm-parts: POST: Chốt linh kiện dùng cho ca sửa chữa. Snap giá linh kiện và chuyển trạng thái linh kiện sang in_stock/selected.
repairs./api/repairs/create: POST: Tạo phiếu sửa chữa qua Admin SDK, ép entry status từ workflow Firebase và xác minh KTV được gán.
repairs./api/repairs/handover: POST: Bàn giao máy cho khách. Trừ kho vật lý các linh kiện đã dùng, ghi log Inventory, tính hoa hồng.
repairs./api/repairs/payment-edit: POST: Cập nhật thông tin thanh toán (deposit, discount, final amount) cho phiếu sửa chữa.
repairs./api/repairs/technician/assign: POST: Quản lý Sale/Admin gán KTV lần đầu; xác minh user đích và ghi audit log.
repairs./api/repairs/technician/transfer: POST: Tạo, chấp nhận, từ chối hoặc hủy yêu cầu chuyển KTV. Chỉ KTV nhận mới được chấp nhận.
repairs./api/repairs/transition: POST: Chuyển trạng thái theo repairStatuses/warrantyStatuses; requireChecklist, requirePartsReady và requireTechnicianNote là exit gates của trạng thái hiện tại; bắt buộc KTV khi rời tiếp nhận và ghi manager override/audit log.

revalidate./api/revalidate: POST: Revalidate Next.js App Router Cache (ISR). Chấp nhận secret nội bộ hoặc signed admin session cookie; sentinel layout chỉ invalidates /(customer) storefront layout.

reviews./api/reviews/google: GET: Fetch Google Business Reviews with server-side Place Details (New), field mask, one-day cache, and storefront response normalization.
reviews./api/reviews/product: POST: Lưu đánh giá riêng cho 1 sản phẩm cụ thể.
reviews./api/reviews: GET/POST: Lưu đánh giá chung (dịch vụ, cửa hàng) có kèm Honeypot chống spam.

search./api/search: GET: Global Search nhanh (dùng trên Header của web).

services./api/services/homepage-pricing: GET: Lấy dịch vụ active và giá thật từ collection services cho bảng giá homepage.

tracking./api/tracking: POST: Khách hàng tự tra cứu tiến độ sửa chữa/đơn hàng bằng số điện thoại.

/api/admin/taxonomy.description: Admin-only transactional taxonomy mutation. It refuses missing configuration and never seeds DEFAULT_CONFIG.

/api/search.description: Public catalog search only; returns whitelisted product/service DTO fields and does not expose order/repair documents.

/api/admin/search.description: Admin/staff global search for catalog plus masked order/repair exact or phone lookup.
